data.body: Consideration: [Testing] Existing content-validation tests (tests/scripts/test-no-v2-refs-in-claude-md.sh and tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh) validate CLAUDE.md content for banned references. F's 290+ reference update may introduce new substrings (transitional language, deprecation notes, or CLI-replacement pointers) that these tests interpret as violations. Pre-sweep, run both tests to establish baseline; post-sweep, re-run and update test expectations in the SAME commit if legitimate new language tripped the grep. Do not let these tests silently break on the F merge. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
